---
title: "Homework 5 - California Wind Turbines"
author: "Ehsan"
date: "2026-03-19"
output: html_document
---

## Load Libraries

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(maps)
library(mapdata)

# Load US map data
states <- map_data("state")

# Filter California
california <- states %>%
  filter(region == "california")

# Load wind turbine dataset
load("DATA/wind_turbines.rda")

# Check structure (optional)
names(wind_turbines)

# Filter California turbines
wind_ca <- wind_turbines %>%
  filter(t_state == "CA")

ggplot() +
  geom_polygon(
    data = california,
    aes(x = long, y = lat, group = group),
    fill = "lightblue",
    color = "black"
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = wind_ca,
    aes(x = xlong, y = ylat),
    color = "red",
    size = 1.5,
    alpha = 0.7
  ) +
  coord_fixed(1.3) +
  labs(
    title = "Wind Turbine Locations in California",
    x = "Longitude",
    y = "Latitude"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
